vwap.summary: Reverted ENTRY_STD_THRESHOLD 1.5σ → 1.0σ (undoing PR #1205) and SL_STD_MULT_DEFAULT 0.75σ → 0.5σ (undoing PR #1183). The 2026-05-17 backtest sweep across 3.16 years of BTCUSDT 5m with the HTF 4h ±2% gate present showed V_1175_htf_only (1.0σ entry, 0.5σ SL) Total R +411.8 vs V_PROD (1.5σ, 0.75σ SL) +133.1 — 3× advantage on the same dataset. The 2026-05-15 #1200 sweep that justified 1.5σ was run without the HTF gate; once the gate is present the optimum shifts. SL widening hurt in both gate regimes.

Wired regime-classifier-baseline-v0 as a shadow predictor on VWAP signals (zero production effect — predictions logged to runtime_logs/shadow_predictions.jsonl only). Promoted to `shadow` stage via trainer-vm-diag #1203. Macro_f1=0.33 on n=4147, f1_range=0.62 — gathering 30 days of data to correlate model-says-range with VWAP winners

Raised ENTRY_STD_THRESHOLD 1.0σ → 1.5σ following issue #1200 threshold sweep (8 random 30-day windows, May 2025-April 2026): 1.5σ mean Sharpe 0.015 vs 1.0σ 0.011, mean total R 6.38 vs 6.02, 4/8 positive windows vs 3/8. Cadence drops ~30% (387 → 295 trades/30d). Same ordering as the 38-month V6 experiment, so not regime-overfit

Added min_r_for_vwap_cross (0.25R) + min_hold_minutes_for_vwap_cross (10m) gates on the vwap_cross close path — suppresses micro-R exits from VWAP-drifts-to-price (3/6 closes on 2026-05-14 exited at R-capture 0.009-0.085, net loss after fees)
Raised SL_STD_MULT 0.5→0.75 + added ATR floor on stop distance — reduces premature SL hits on volatile bars
Fixed order_package() SL always falling back to 2% flat stop regardless of signal SL
Added 4h EMA-200 ±2% HTF trend gate — backtest Sharpe -0.39→+2.47, walk-forward OOS +0.22→+1.10
Changed timeframe 15m→5m for faster mean-reversion signal cadence

turtle_soup.summary: Cadence pair: min_sweep_buffer_bps=10, tp1_at_r=1.00, setup_lookback_bars=4 — OOS Sharpe +1.22→+2.48
Tightened atr_stop_mult 0.35→0.30 (+0.53 Sharpe full-sample, +0.97 OOS, no cadence cost)
